message:
🌱 ci: raise coverage gate threshold 80%→91% per reviewer policy (#9963)

The Coverage Gate workflow had COVERAGE_THRESHOLD=80 while reviewer
policy sets the floor at 91%. This allowed a silent 11-point regression
window where coverage could drop to 80% without the gate failing.

Raises the threshold to match the policy floor so any meaningful drop
in test coverage is caught at PR time.

Closes scanner-beads-89z8

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -21,7 +21,7 @@ concurrency:
 
 env:
   NODE_VERSION: '22'
-  COVERAGE_THRESHOLD: 80
+  COVERAGE_THRESHOLD: 91
 
 jobs:
   coverage-gate:
